title: Bogus upgrade message keeps appearing when I open a board

posts.author: lpblue (Linda Phillips Blue)
posts.cookedHtml:
For the last 2 days every time I open a board from my Favorites list on the left, I see a full screen message where the board should be that says this.

“You’re currently on the Pro plan.
Upgrade to Standard to unlock Shareable Boards and many more features like:
(Learn more button)
[Switch board from shareable to main]”

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hey! I sent this along to the team to check. Are you still having the issue? It seems it maybe something with our account.

posts.author: lpblue (Linda Phillips Blue)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks Juliette. Yes it’s still happening.

Linda

| Juliette Julietteb monday.com Team Member
July 14 |

  • | - |

Hey! I sent this along to the team to check. Are you still having the issue? It seems it maybe something with our account.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Linda,

Did you submit a ticket? I told the team to look out for it?! Contact support - Help Center

posts.author: SheilaJ (Sheila )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

I don’t think it is just your account, we are seeing something similar across our account also over the past few days.
Our message tells us we are on the Pro Plan and to Upgrade to the Pro Plan to unlock Private boards etc.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Maybe ask people to send you a message if they are having this issue and you can look into the account? Not sure what is happening here

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Linda and Sheila! I just sent you both direct message to gather more information about your accounts so that we can best help and look into this for you

posts.author: lpblue (Linda Phillips Blue)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Sheila – I didn’t open a support ticket because I thought someone on your end was looking into it. Let me know if you think I should.

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Linda! I sent you a DM yesterday. Whenever you get a chance, could you please check your inbox and send a reply? I’d be more than happy to assist you from there!

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Linda! I’ve checked on the case I opened for you in July with our Technical Support Team, and it looks like they closed it because you mentioned that the behavior had stopped. No need to worry, though! I’ve opened a new ticket for you, and they’ll be reaching out to you via email to help resolve!

posts.author: lpblue (Linda Phillips Blue)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, it seemed to stop for a few days but is back again lately. Thanks.

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml: You’re welcome! I see that one of our Technical Support Team member’s has connected with you. However, please do let me know if you need anything else
